ignored_examples.snippet: Subject: Re: Action needed - don’t lose your momentum\n\nBody: Hello I’ve requested multiple times to cancel the service. I’m no longer in continuing the subscription. Best, Fiona Taylor 469-981-3021 Faces by Fiona Office Your Beauty Expert

cause_analysis.narrative: Faces by Fiona churned on 2026-03-14 after 177 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2025-12-23 (app_chat) — first complaint keyword: "error". Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side. Median Zoca response time was 9.0 days, above the 24-hour expectation.
recommendations: [Retention] Implement a 'cancellation keyword' realtime alert to AMs + Growth team. Today this signal is discovered only post-churn.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-13 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: Action needed - don’t lose your momentum\n\nBody: Hello I’ve requested multiple times to cancel the service…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
